'''Nadra Enasteri''' was the daughter of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Neth Enasteri]] and [[Charis Enasteri]].

==Biography==
When she was only a year old, her father was forced to flee [[Rhamalai]] to avoid being caught by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]], leaving his family behind. Nadra grew up believing her father was dead.

She wanted to train as a medic and healer at the [[Bellorin Medical Academy]] on [[Seitia Prime]], but stayed with her ill mother. Nadra mastered [[Zimchai]], and found work as a civilian medic in the local governmental offices.<ref name="TOoR" />
